focus: Military fight-science proof + Bas Rutten counterweight — medical victimization RCT explicitly de-weighted

weightingProfile.name: Fight Science + Rutten
weightingProfile.plainEnglish: Scores what survives military doctrine, street fight data, full-contact proof, and Rutten's avoidance-first hybrid — not who has the best medical trial.
weightingProfile.c7Policy: Medical victimization RCT (C7) weighted at 0.10 — logged but does not crown the stack.
weightingProfile.counterweight: Bas Rutten Lethal Street (distilled) added as explicit hybrid benchmark against classroom-only and sport-only systems.

methodologyPlainEnglish.name: 3×7 Adversarial Voting — Round 3
methodologyPlainEnglish.whatThreeMeans: 3 AI reviewer personas — fight scientist, Rutten street counterweight, operational skeptic who refuses medical RCT as king
methodologyPlainEnglish.whatSevenMeans: 7 approaches scored on 7 questions with fight-science and live-resistance criteria weighted highest

threeWaves.name: Independent scoring
threeWaves.plainEnglish: Each reviewer scores from military doctrine, Louie Martin street cohort, UFC/Pancrase validation, and Rutten NHI reconciliation — not NEJM alone.

threeWaves.name: Adversarial challenge
threeWaves.plainEnglish: Fight scientist slashes EAAA on C4/C6. Rutten voter challenges MMA engagement culture. Skeptic blocks Krav-style scripts without pressure proof. Medical RCT scores recorded but weight locked at 0.10.

threeWaves.name: Consensus & penalties
threeWaves.plainEnglish: Revised scores. Rutten hybrid must survive skeptic on weapon disarm overreach and 75-technique bloat. Weighted totals use fight-science profile.

methodologyPlainEnglish.whyItFindsRightData: When you refuse to let a campus medical trial crown the entire self-defense industry, what rises is: military SA doctrine, Rutten's three-tier stack, and boxing/Muay Thai/wrestling delivery under live resistance.
methodologyPlainEnglish.notThis: Not anti-EAAA. EAAA still logs the highest raw medical score — it simply does not own the weighting profile you asked for.

voters.name: Military Fight Scientist
voters.trusts: OODA/Boyd reaction-time data, 10-second KO window, street-fight cohort stats, full-contact sparring transfer
voters.distrusts: Classroom-only awareness without physical validation, sport rules that hide exit failure

voters.name: Rutten Street Counterweight
voters.trusts: Bas Rutten three-tier stack, Pancrase/UFC delivery, teep/calf/clinch burst, explicit avoidance-before-contact
voters.distrusts: Pure sport MMA engagement, 75-technique catalogs, disarm heroics, medical trial as sole SD metric

voters.name: Operational Skeptic
voters.trusts: LE/military adoption, NCVS field outcomes, Louie Martin n=154, pressure-tested technique tiers
voters.distrusts: Gym marketing, medical RCT generalized beyond studied population, Cooper Color without drills

criteria.name: Proactive Threat Detection & Avoidance
criteria.description: Military SA + Rutten Tier 1 — sense danger and exit before contact

criteria.name: Multi-Attacker Escape Architecture
criteria.description: Angle, shield, one-strike-then-sprint — not drawn into numerical disadvantage

criteria.name: Fight Science & Military Doctrine Alignment
criteria.description: Reaction-time physics, 64% KO in 10 sec, ground-risk stats, OODA/Stay Alert coherence

criteria.name: Unarmed 1v1 Fight-Ending Technique
criteria.description: Standing burst that ends or stuns in the contact window

criteria.name: Control Without Excessive Harm
criteria.description: Grappling restraint — LE domain, lower weight for civilian SD

criteria.name: Stress Transfer Under Live Resistance
criteria.description: Highest weight — sparring, full-contact, adrenal delivery proof

criteria.name: Medical Victimization RCT
criteria.description: Logged only — explicitly de-weighted per user profile; does not crown rankings

interventions: Boxing + Wrestling + Muay Thai (fight science stack)
Stay Alert Stay Alive + Cooper SA Doctrine

Rutten Lethal Street (distilled hybrid).verdict: Wins under fight-science weighting. Rutten Tier 1 = military-grade avoidance framing. Tier 2–3 = boxing + Muay Thai burst with explicit exit cap. Pancrase/UFC validates C6. Resilience distills 75+ techniques to ~12 staples. Weapon disarm still Tier C–D — comply/run parallel rule applies.

Boxing + Wrestling + Muay Thai (fight sc.verdict: Pure fight-science delivery — 64% KOs in first 10 sec, boxing kinetic chain, sprawl without ground entanglement. Weak on proactive avoidance because gyms train engagement. Best contact-phase engine when layered under Rutten/military SA mind.

Stay Alert Stay Alive + Cooper SA Doctri.verdict: Military force-protection doctrine — correct avoidance-first philosophy, institutional adoption, zero civilian victimization RCT. Rises on mind game; collapses on C4/C6 because it is not a fighting system.

EAAA / Empowerment Self-Defense.verdict: Still owns the highest raw medical score (C7 = 10) — but at 0.10 weight it no longer crowns the stack. Tier A+ for women in the trial only; men not studied. Strong Assess/Acknowledge for pre-contact. Weak C4/C6: 2 hours physical in 12-hour classroom program. Adjunct brain layer for men; primary proof layer for women in studied population.

Integrated MMA (Boxing + Wrestling + Mua.verdict: Supreme C4/C6 when fight is unavoidable. Rutten counterweight slashes C1/C2 — gym culture rewards engagement and ground play, not premeditated exit. Sport-optimal, street-primary strategy failure.

Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu.verdict: Tier A for LE control (C5). Tier F for multi-attacker proactive escape. Ground-first violates fight-science street stats (62–73% ground, 41% stand-up). Stand-up escapes only — not sport guard.

Traditional Martial Arts (low-contact).verdict: Unanimous last place. Fails C6 stress transfer. No fight-science delivery. Historical philosophy may align; modern point-sparring implementation does not.

adversarialFindings.finding: When medical RCT weight is set to 0.10, Rutten Lethal Street (distilled) ranks #1 — not because of a campus trial, but because it scores high on avoidance framing AND full-contact burst delivery in one package.
adversarialFindings.plainEnglish: Stop letting the medical trial pick the winner. Rutten wins when you score fighting proof and military-style exit discipline.

adversarialFindings.finding: Bas Rutten Tier 1 (avoid if possible) scores within one point of Stay Alert/Cooper on C1 — without claiming medical proof. The counterweight works: street hybrid agrees with military SA mind game.
adversarialFindings.plainEnglish: Rutten and the military both say leave first. Rutten also teaches what to do if you cannot.

adversarialFindings.finding: EAAA retains C7 = 10.0 raw score but drops from rank #1 (Round 2) to rank #4 under fight-science weighting. Medical evidence is logged, not deleted.
adversarialFindings.plainEnglish: EAAA still has the best medical trial — it just does not run the scoreboard in this round.

adversarialFindings.finding: C6 (live resistance) at weight 1.35 elevates boxing/MMA/Rutten and crushes classroom-only systems. 64% street KOs in first 10 seconds is the fight-science anchor for burst caps.
adversarialFindings.plainEnglish: If you will not spar or pressure-test, you do not score high here — no matter how good the PowerPoint is.

adversarialFindings.finding: Optimal stack under fight-science profile: Military SA (Cooper/Stay Alert/OODA) + Rutten Tier 1 fence/verbal + boxing/Muay Thai burst (3–5 beats) + sprawl/stand + sprint exit. EAAA boundary language optional adjunct — not foundation.
adversarialFindings.plainEnglish: Train like Rutten and the military: see it, leave, and if trapped — burst then run. EAAA vocabulary helps; it does not replace the physical proof.

recommendedStack.component: Military SA mind game — Cooper Yellow→Orange→Red + Stay Alert + OODA tempo
Rutten Tier 1 — fence, verbal stall, angle step, leave early
Muay Thai teep + calf kick (Rutten staples)
Rutten capped clinch — frame + 3 knees max → push-off
Wrestling sprawl → stand immediately (no ground war)
Sprint exit to people/light — weapon parallel: comply + run

eaaaNote.plainEnglish: EAAA is not wrong — it is the wrong king when you refuse to weight medical evidence. Keep Assess/Acknowledge vocabulary. Build the body on Rutten + fight science.
